title: Device tree basics
description: Device tree basics documents overview material for Device tree in the system domain. It is classified as an operation page for the kernel class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Using device tree compiler, Check nodes and properties, DTS modification, fdtget/fdtput, and Decompiled file modification, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include kernel, device tree basics, device-tree, and system, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is system / device-tree / overview, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation.
